subcodes.first_line: O Lord, unto Thee be praise, for the dove hath warbled its praise in the grove of faithfulness, and Thou hast inspired the eloquent nightingale [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم لک الحمد بما نطقت الورقاء بالثناء فی ایکه الوفا و الهمت العندلیب الفصیح
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @the power of words; of speech
